title: DfT: FOI and EIR disclosure log 2025
body: "List of full and partial responses to freedom of information (FOI) and environmental information regulations (EIR) requests in 2025.  If you would like a copy of a response to any of the listed requests, you can write to us:   FOI RequestsDepartment for TransportFOI Advice Team3rd FloorOne Priory SquareHastings, TN34 1EA   Alternatively, you can request a copy of a response through smart survey.  You can also call: 0300 330 3000.  For other DfT FOI and EIR releases, see:   2024 FOI and EIR disclosure log 2023 FOI and EIR disclosure log   "
